film.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
film.overview: Axel Foley returns to the land of sunshine and palm trees to investigate the near-fatal shooting of police Captain Andrew Bogomil. With the help of Sgt. Taggart and Det. Rosewood, they soon uncover that the shooting is associated with a series of "alphabet" robberies masterminded by a heartless weapons kingpin—and the chase is on.

dialogues.dialogue: 現在他是市民了  有權利像其它人一樣扭屁股了 Now he's a civilian, and it's his right to shake his a*s like everybody else.  他要狂歡  要去那里  他說要去385北方 I said, "Where you wanna go?" 我是聯調局特遣組 I'm with the FBI Enforcement Bulletin.  -我一直在看  -非常感謝 -I read it all the time.  -Thank you very much, sir.  別碰皮面  甜心 We're proud of it ourselves. Don't touch the leather, sweetheart.  我的主管要求我面試 My director has asked me to interview  當地警員 an exceptional local law enforcement officer,
